title: Nmap Scripting Engine (NSE)
description: Lua-based scripting engine that extends Nmap with vulnerability detection, exploitation, and advanced enumeration.
fullExplanation: The Nmap Scripting Engine (NSE) allows users to write and run Lua scripts that interact with target hosts. NSE scripts can detect vulnerabilities, enumerate services, brute-force credentials, and even exploit weaknesses. Scripts are organized into categories. The --script flag runs specific scripts or categories. NSE has over 600 built-in scripts.

scriptCategories.description: Discover hosts via broadcast (DHCP, mDNS, etc.)
Safe, useful scripts run with -sC flag
Send malformed data to detect crashes
Aggressive scripts that may crash services
Non-intrusive scripts unlikely to cause harm

usefulScripts.description: Test for SQL injection in web forms

keyFacts: NSE scripts written in Lua — easy to write custom scripts
nmap --script-updatedb: update script database after adding new scripts
Always get written permission before running intrusive or exploit scripts
